nasb.text: Moses and Eleazar the priest and all the leaders of the congregation went out to meet them outside the camp.

esv.text: Moses and Eleazar the priest and all the chiefs of the congregation went to meet them outside the camp.

cnv.text: 摩西和以利亞撒祭司，以及會眾所有的領袖，都出到營外迎接他們。

ccb.text: 摩西、以利亚撒祭司以及所有民众的首领都到营外迎接他们。
